title: Indigestion Tablets
description: This mod provides a food item: Jianwei Xiaoshi Tablets. It can convert satiety into health regeneration and damage absorption, while maintaining a maximum half-satiated state.(AI Translation)
body:
After consumption, you will gain the "Jianwei Xiaoshi" effect for 10 minutes. While Saturation > 0 or Fullness > 10, each game tick consumes 25% of Saturation (minimum 2 points) or 1 point of Fullness, restoring health. Once health is fully restored, damage absorption is granted instead, which can accumulate up to your maximum health value. Drinking water removes the "Jianwei Xiaoshi" effect. Crafted via shapeless recipe using wheat and sweet berries.

本模组新增食物“健胃消食片”，可将饱食度转化为生命恢复与伤害吸收效果，并始终将饱食度维持在不超过半饱状态，避免过饱负担，可以继续吃想吃的东西。

服用后获得持续10分钟的“健胃消食”效果。当饱和度大于0或饱食度高于10时，每游戏刻将消耗25%的饱和度（最低2点）或1点饱食度，优先恢复生命值；生命值满后转为累积伤害吸收盾，上限为角色最大生命值。饮水可立即解除该效果（伤害吸收不会解除）。合成方式：使用小麦与甜浆果进行无序合成。

![回复生命和过量恢复](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b08b2d813a49f790f63c584c7e7a543826c20aa1.png)
![效果图标](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3420e2e48cc502feccb72bfff839e2b81569ab8.png)
